title: Breakdown: planning-bracket fan-out
description:
Fan-out node for the plan-before-fan-out bracket. Created at breakdown of the approved plan; depends on the planning node; carries the coverage-preview and breakdown-review gates.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] All planned child issues exist and are wired into the container spine (sources depend on this node; sinks gate the container).
- [ ] The breakdown gates on this node (coverage-preview, breakdown-review) pass before it is marked done.
